name: Stratus Properties Inc.
summary: Stratus Properties Inc., a real estate company, engages in the acquisition, entitlement, development, management, and sale of commercial, and multi-and single-family residential real estate properties primarily in Texas. The company operates in four segments: Real Estate Operations, Leasing Operations, Hotel, and Entertainment. Its leasing operations cover lease of space at retail and mixed-use properties; and residences in multi-family apartment complexes. The company also operates hotel under the W Austin hotel name that includes 251 luxury rooms and suites; restaurant and bars; a full-service spa; fitness center; pool and outdoor terraces; and meeting and banquet spaces. In addition, it operates entertainment space that includes 2,750-seats live music, entertainment venue, and production studio; and hosts concerts and private events. Stratus Properties Inc. was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas.
